neighbors.name: Brenden & Amber Linendoll
neighbors.claims: Amber Linendoll is employed by the Cochise County Sheriff's Office ([cochise.az.gov](https://www.cochise.az.gov/DocumentCenter/View/10341/County-Phone-Roster-by-Department-PDF)). Brenden Linendoll serves as a Deputy Sheriff for Cochise County; he was approved for membership in the Public Safety Personnel Retirement System (PSPRS) as a Deputy Sheriff candidate in 2021 ([cochise.az.gov](https://www.cochise.az.gov/AgendaCenter/ViewFile/Minutes/_07212021-102)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Engage with respect for their law enforcement roles. Highlight site security measures and traffic management plans to ensure the project does not burden Sheriff's Office resources.
